headline: Crypto Ecosystem Worth $1B Backs AI Agents

article.title: ‘Developed ecosystem’ based on crypto has sprung up for AI agents: Report
article.summary: Stablecoins became the default settlement layer for AI agents as crypto payment rails can handle sub-dollar transactions more efficiently, says a report from Keyrock.

article.title: Kalshi backs prediction markets lobby group with former Trump official
article.summary: "We’re not going to be outspent or out-organized by entrenched interests protecting their monopolies," said John Bivona, head of government relations at Kalshi.

headline: Hormuz Traffic Surges 20% Amid Tanker Influx

article.title: Abu Dhabi, Qatar Quietly Slip More Tankers Through Hormuz
article.summary: Abu Dhabi National Oil Co. has been quietly ferrying oil and gas shipments out of the Persian Gulf using its own fleet, apparently clearing both the Iranian navy and US warships to reach energy-starved customers.

headline: European Gas Futures Fall 5% on Iran Deal Hopes

article.title: European Gas Drops as US Signals Progress Toward Deal With Iran
article.summary: European natural gas dropped, extending last week’s decline, on optimism that the US and Iran are nearing a deal that would reopen the Strait of Hormuz, a critical chokepoint for global energy supplies.

headline: Ethereum Foundation Slashes ETH Sales Amid $1B Exodus
